range_of_weeks_with_commits.title: Week Range of Commits
range_of_weeks_with_commits.description: Average number of weeks between commits

successive_weeks_with_commits.title: Successive Weeks with Commits
successive_weeks_with_commits.description: Number of successive weeks in which the file was included in a commit

weeks_with_commits.title: Weeks with Commits
weeks_with_commits.description: Number of weeks in which commits occurred

highly_coupled_files.title: Highly Coupled Files
highly_coupled_files.description: Number of highly coupled files (>=35% of times modified the same time) with this file

median_coupled_files.title: Median Coupled Files
median_coupled_files.description: Median of number of other files that where committed with this file

temporal_coupling.title: Temporal Coupling
temporal_coupling.description: The degree of temporal coupling between two files (>=35%)

feat_commits.title: Feature Commits
feat_commits.description: Number of commits starting with 'feat' for this file

fix_commits.title: Fix Commits
fix_commits.description: Number of commits starting with 'fix' for this file

docs_commits.title: Documentation Commits
docs_commits.description: Number of commits starting with 'docs' for this file

style_commits.title: Style Commits
style_commits.description: Number of commits starting with 'style' for this file

refactor_commits.title: Refactor Commits
refactor_commits.description: Number of commits starting with 'refactor' for this file

test_commits.title: Test Commits
test_commits.description: Number of commits starting with 'test' for this file

hotfix_commits.title: Hotfix Commits
hotfix_commits.description: Number of commits containing 'hotfix' keyword for this file

semantic_commit_ratio.title: Semantic Commit Ratio
semantic_commit_ratio.description: Ratio of semantic commits (which start with feat, fix, docs, style, refactor or test) to total commits for this file

hotfix_commit_ratio.title: Hotfix Commit Ratio
hotfix_commit_ratio.description: Ratio of hotfix commits (containing 'hotfix' keyword) to total commits for this file
